trivia: The shorter, longer-legged A330 was Airbus's answer to the 767: a twin widebody with true intercontinental range. Many now serve as government transports and freighter conversions.
Spot the -200 by its stubbier body and taller vertical fin compared to the -300.
funFacts: The basis of the A330 MRTT tanker used by air forces worldwide.
Shares its wing with the four-engined A340.
